title: TREATMENT FOSTER CARE - 211info
text: KAIROS JACKSON SERVICES TREATMENT FOSTER CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits, selects, and trains treatment foster parents (TFP) from the local community and matches them with youth needing a therapeutic foster home setting. Also provides Behavior Rehabilitation Services (BRS) level treatment to youth who meet referral criteria and are matched with an available TFP. 10 Crater Lake Avenue Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Ages 4-17 who are under the jurisdiction of ODHS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information. Must receive referral from ODHS. FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: Referral from ODHS and supporting medical documents AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KAIROS JACKSON SERVICES
